name: seo-rescue
description: Nine SEO skills + orchestrator. Type /seo-rescue:rescue for the routing table, or call sub-skills directly: /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free (free-tier audit), /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery (Core Update recovery framework), /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report (decision-maker PDF via Sistrix+DataForSEO+PSI), /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer (per-channel P&L for 30+ marketplaces), /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit (DataForSEO keyword-gap analysis), /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline (automated PSI tracking), /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue (AI Overviews + ChatGPT + Perplexity citation framework), /seo-rescue:ai-citations-tracker (weekly cron tracker for ChatGPT/Perplexity brand citations, NDJSON history), /seo-rescue:gsc-deep-dive (Google Search Console API: queries + pages + coverage + CrUX field data in one JSON snapshot).
